inputs.label: Numerator
inputs.businessContext: The value to be divided (the top of the fraction).

businessContext_i18n.en: The value to be divided (the top of the fraction).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der zu teilende Wert (der Zähler des Bruchs).
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur à diviser (le numérateur de la fraction).
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor a dividir (numerador de la fracción).

inputs.label: Denominator
inputs.businessContext: The value to divide by (the bottom of the fraction). Must not be zero.

businessContext_i18n.en: The value to divide by (the bottom of the fraction). Must not be zero.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bölen değer (kesrin alt kısmı). Sıfır olamaz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Wert, durch den geteilt wird (der Nenner des Bruchs). Darf nicht null sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur par laquelle diviser (le dénominateur de la fraction). Ne doit pas être zéro.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor divisor (denominador de la fracción). No debe ser cero.

inputs.label: Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to apply to the ratio, e.g., 100 for percentage, 1 for raw ratio.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to apply to the ratio, e.g., 100 for percentage, 1 for raw ratio.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Orana uygulanacak çarpan, örn. yüzde için 100, ham oran için 1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für das Verhältnis, z. B. 100 für Prozent, 1 für rohes Verhältnis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur à appliquer au rapport, par exemple 100 pour un pourcentage, 1 pour un rapport brut.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para aplicar a la razón, ej., 100 para porcentaje, 1 para razón simple.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the final output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the final output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nihai çıktının yuvarlanacağı ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Rundung des Endergebnisses.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir le résultat final.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear el resultado final.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
